headline: OpenAI to nearly double workforce to 8,000 by end-2026
summary: Artificial intelligence start-up OpenAI plans to nearly double its workforce to 8,000 from 4,500 by the end of 2026.

headline: Thousands of people are selling their identities to train AI – but at what cost?
summary: People are earning money by uploading personal data, photos, videos and ambient audio to train AI models through apps like Kled AI and Silencio.

headline: Prediction: This Fallen AI Stock Could Be the Comeback Story of 2026
summary: IBM stock crashed after news that Anthropic's AI tools could tackle COBOL coding tasks, but analysts predict a potential comeback.

headline: NASA's Perseverance rover completed the first Mars drives ever planned by AI
summary: Using Anthropic's Claude vision-language models to analyze orbital imagery and terrain data and autonomously generate safe waypoints.

headline: Apple announces AI-powered Siri debut in 2026 with on-screen awareness
summary: A completely reimagined, AI-powered version of Siri is set to debut in 2026 with context-aware capabilities and on-screen awareness.

headline: Google expands personalized Gemini AI to all US users
summary: Google is rolling out its Personal Intelligence feature to all US users, allowing Gemini to draw on data from connected apps like Gmail, Photos, and YouTube.

headline: People in Sub-Saharan Africa and Asia more optimistic about AI than Western Europe and North America
summary: According to an Anthropic report surveying 81,000 people in 159 countries, optimism about AI varies significantly by region.

headline: Morgan Stanley warns an AI breakthrough is coming in 2026
summary: A massive AI breakthrough is coming in the first half of 2026 and Morgan Stanley says most of the world isn't ready for it.

headline: AI-driven method could help scientists better understand disease mechanisms
summary: By providing holistic information on a cell, an AI-driven method could help scientists better understand disease mechanisms and plan experiments.

headline: Multi-agent deep learning research advances
summary: New research on multi-agent deep learning including multi-agent deep reinforcement learning, distributed/federated training, and graph-structured neural networks.
